svg.text: ECO-SIM: AMF Fungi × Cerrado Roots - Mycorrhizal Seasonality
The Upside-Down Forest: Carbon, Phosphorus, and Hydraulic Lift via Common Mycorrhizal Networks

g.text: CMN: seasonal exchange network below ground.
• Yellow: wet-season carbon to fungal partners
• Magenta: phosphorus returned for root flush
• Cyan: hydraulic lift buffers shallow roots
keeping the shallow CMN active under drought stress.
• Green dots: sporulation builds resilience after rains.
